accounting_description: Funda ukuthi ungabala kanjani ngendlela efanele izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ekubaleni amabhuku ebhizinisi lakho.
accounting_s1_c1: Ukwamukela i-Bitcoin kunezinzuzo eziningi njengokwamukela izinkokhelo ngezimali eziphansi nokuThola amakhasimende amaningi.
accounting_s1_c2: Uma usebenzisa Isikhwama Esihlangene esivela Kumhlahlandlela Wethu Wesikhwama futhi uthengise ngokuzenzakalelayo i-100% ye-Bitcoin oyitholayo ngamadola, awudingi ukwenza izinguquko ekubaleni amabhuku kwakho okwamanje.
accounting_s1_c4: Kodwa-ke, uma ugcina enye ye-Bitcoin ozitholayo njengo-Bitcoin, uzodinga ukuqapha imininingwane embalwa yokubala amabhuku akho. Lokhu kungabonakala kungesabi ekuqaleni, kodwa empeleni kulula kakhulu.
accounting_s1_c5: Sicela uqaphele: lo mhlahlandlela ungenxa yolwazi kuphela futhi akufanele uthathwe njengeseluleko sentela.
accounting_s1_c6: Uma udinga iseluleko sentela, sincoma kakhulu i-Satoshi Pacioli Accounting Services, inkampani yokubala amabhuku egxile ekubaleni amabhuku e-Bitcoin.
accounting_s2_c1: Ukulandelela isisekelo sezindleko zakho kuzoba umehluko omkhulu kakhulu phakathi kokubala amadola nokubala i-Bitcoin. Ngisho noma ubheka ibhizinisi lakho lonke ngamazwi e-Bitcoin, udinga ukubika inani ledola lokwenzeka ngakunye enteleleni yakho.
accounting_s2_c2: Uma usebenzisa i-QuickBooks, ungakwenza lokhu ngokuzenzakalelayo usebenzisa iplagi ye-Bitcoin Sync.
accounting_s2_c3: Uma ungasebenzisi i-QuickBooks, sincoma i-Satoshi Pacioli Accounting Services, inkampani yokubala amabhuku egxile ekubaleni amabhuku e-Bitcoin.
accounting_s2_c4: Ukwenza lokhu ngesandla, kumane udinge ukulandelela inani le-Bitcoin oyitholile nenani ledola lokwenzeka kwe-Bitcoin ngalolo suku.
accounting_s2_c5: Ungabuka intengo yamanje yadola ye-Bitcoin lapha.
accounting_s2_c6: Landelela lolu lwazi ku-Excel spreadsheet bese ulunikeza umbalisi wamabhuku akho.
accounting_s2_c7: Ungakwazi futhi ukungenisa le datha ku-Excel ngokuzenzakalelayo.
accounting_s2_c8: Ungakwazi futhi ukubuka intengo yamadola yakamuva ye-Bitcoin ngezinsuku ezedlule, ngakho awudingi ukwenza lokhu nsuku zonke.
accounting_s3_c1: Uma usebenzisa Isikhwama Esihlangene esivela Kumhlahlandlela Wethu Wesikhwama futhi uthengise ngokuzenzakalelayo i-100% ye-Bitcoin oyitholayo ngamadola, awudingi ukwenza izinguquko ekubaleni amabhuku kwakho okwamanje.
accounting_s3_c3: Uma ukhetha ukusebenzisa noma ukuthengisa enye ye-Bitcoin oyitholayo ngemuva kokuyigcina isikhashana, udinga nje ukufaka intengo oyithengise ngayo ku-Excel spreadsheet yakho elandelela isisekelo sezindleko zakho.
accounting_s3_c4: Ngokwesibonelo, uma uthole i-Bitcoin engu-$100 ngoJanuwari 1 futhi wanquma ukuyithengisa noma ukuyisebenzisa ngoFebhuwari 1 ngenani elisha langu-$110, uzodinga ukurekhodwa inzuzo yenhlokodolobha engu-$10 ekubaleni amabhuku akho.
accounting_s3_c5: Lokhu kungasebenza nangendlela ephambene. Ngokwesibonelo, uma uthole i-Bitcoin engu-$100 ngoJanuwari 1 futhi wanquma ukuyithengisa noma ukuyisebenzisa ngoFebhuwari 1 ngenani elisha langu-$90, uzodinga ukurekhodwa ukulahlekelwa kwenhlokodolobha engu-$10 ekubaleni amabhuku akho.
accounting_s4_c1: Uma udinga usizo olwengeziwe lokuhlanganisa i-Bitcoin ekubaleni amabhuku ebhizinisi lakho, sincoma kakhulu i-Satoshi Pacioli Accounting Services, inkampani yokubala amabhuku egxile ekubaleni amabhuku e-Bitcoin.
accounting_s4_c2: Funda kabanzi nge-Satoshi Pacioli Accounting Services.
